title: campanula fragilis
intro: Campanula fragilis, also known as the brittle bellflower, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Campanula genus and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits associated with Campanula fragilis include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Campanula fragilis, such as infusions and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties, but caution and consultation with a healthcare professional are advised before using any herbal remedies.
